description: Canonical Strand API surface. Every consumer type must implement this surface. The parity test reads this file and asserts conformance. Adding a primitive is a PR that updates this file AND adds the primitive to every consumer type in the same release. Removing a primitive requires a major version bump.

Banner.note: Banner component exists in strand-ui but not in strand-svelte or strand-vue. Excluded from the parity manifest until Banner is added to all three framework libraries. Adding it is a parity-raising task in a future session.

notes: This manifest is the MVP parity contract. Extension to track prop shapes, CSS class names, and tokens is future work. The current contract asserts: (1) every component name here exists as a directory in every framework package's components folder, (2) every publishable package has the same version number.
